name: review-loop
description: Codex port of the adversarial review loop workflow using Codex subagents and agency-agents reviewer personas. Includes the simplicity and cold-read legibility counter-pressures, so an iterated review neither bloats the code nor turns a spec into a patch pile only the loop can read. Works on anything already written — a proposal, a spec, or a diff, including pure prose; a decision with nothing written yet is council. Requires the agency-agents catalog at ~/.agency-agents (install per the README); a role it cannot resolve there halts the run rather than standing in a fabricated expert.

interface.shortDescription: Iterative adversarial review loop for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Run an adversarial review and fix loop over the current proposal and code change. The Codex port delegates review and fixes through Codex subagents and agency-agents custom agents when available.
defaultPrompt: Use $review-loop to review this change until it passes.
